name: Caraway Rye
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the bread flour, all-purpose flour, rye flour, salt, and caraway seeds.
3. Add butter to the dry ingredients and mix until crumbly.
4. Gradually add warm water and yeast to the mixture, stirring until a dough forms.
5. Turn off the heat and let the dough rest for 10 minutes.
6. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool before serving.
